from contextvars import ContextVar

# Correct: use middleware to extract context once, storing it in ContextVars for seamless logging downstream
current_trace_id = ContextVar("trace_id", default="unknown")

def middleware(request):
    current_trace_id.set(request.headers.get("X-Trace-Id"))

def view_profile():
    logger.info(f"[{current_trace_id.get()}] Viewing profile")

def edit_profile():
    logger.info(f"[{current_trace_id.get()}] Editing profile")
